## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      3 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jan 28, 2026 - Jun 7, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _no u need a sandwhich_, May 24, 2026, 1/5: "App crashed and was unusable for the whole exam season. No biggie though, it’s not like I kept ALL my FLASHCARDS on the FLASHCARDS app."
            2. _Study_Nerd_, May 15, 2026, 1/5: "I paid for the app when this was still under the name Anki. This is not the Anki app this is a rip off of the original. That is why they changed their name to Noji. They are misleading & this app crash for 10 days. They will still charge you 30.00 even when you cancel. Beware!"
            3. _Batwing53_, May 3, 2026, 3/5: "Noji has been a game changer for my daily study routine! I've been using it every day and it just fits so perfectly into my schedule, like I don’t even have to force myself to open it. The AI card creation is super cool, makes learning so much easier. That said, I do wish I had discovered this app earlier! I've noticed a few bugs here and there but nothing major. Overall, I'm really enjoying my time with it and can't wait to see my progress. Definitely recommend it!"
